gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/440)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/440)
text: ا قُلْنَا لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) هَذِهِ الرِّيَاحُ وَ الظُّلَمُ الَّتِي تَكُونُ هَلْ يُصَلَّى لَهَا فَقَالَ كُلُّ أَخَاوِيفِ السَّمَاءِ مِنْ ظُلْمَةٍ أَوْ رِيحٍ أَوْ فَزَعٍ فَصَلِّ لَهُ صَلَاةَ الْكُسُوفِ حَتَّى يَسْكُنَ .

en.hubeali: Hammad, from Hareyz, from Zurara and Muhammad Bin Muslim who both said,

‘We said to Abu Ja’farasws, ‘These (strong) winds and the darkness which occur, should one pray Salāt for it?’ So heasws said: ‘Every fear of the sky, from a darkness, or a wind, or a terror, so pray Salāt for it, Salāt of the eclipse, until it settles’.
en.sarwar: 3. Hammad has narrated from Hariz from Zurarah and Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “We once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the wind and darkness that at certain times come, is there any Salah (prayer) because of it? He (the Imam) said, ‘When anything frightening from the sky in the form of darkness, wind or noise takes place, perform Salah (prayer) like that of eclipse until it clears out.’”
